prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": false,
    "hallucinations": true,
    "suggestions": "The agent incorrectly identified the failure mode for intermittent partial discharge symptoms and failed to justify the match rationale. It also did not correctly correlate the sensor readings with the identified failure mode."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: The agent incorrectly identified the failure mode for intermittent partial discharge symptoms and failed to justify the match rationale. It also did not correctly correlate the sensor readings with the identified failure mode.
